SELECT x, sqrt(x) AS square_root FROM test_sqrt WHERE x IS NOT NULL;
SELECT sqrt(SELECT AVG(x) FROM test_sqrt) AS average_square_root;
SELECT t1.x, sqrt(t2.y) AS sqrt_y FROM (SELECT x FROM test_sqrt) AS t1 JOIN (SELECT y FROM (SELECT 25 AS y) AS t2) AS t2 ON t1.x > 0;
CREATE TABLE complex_table (id UInt32, val Float32);
SELECT id, val, sqrt(val) AS sqrt_val FROM complex_table WHERE val IS NOT NULL AND val >= 0;
SELECT CASE WHEN val >= 0 THEN sqrt(val) ELSE NULL END AS sqrt_val FROM complex_table;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(x) FROM test_sqrt) AS total_count SELECT total_count, sqrt(total_count);
SELECT sqrt(x) / 2 AS half_sqrt FROM test_sqrt WHERE x > 0;
